function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0003
alias: northstar_backfill_gamma
issued_on: 2025-12-23
total_eur: 530
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar buyer-language sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0003                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_gamma      |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-23                    |
| total_eur      | 530                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 530      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the period when Miles was trying to make the language sound like one product instead of three.

next_step.current_state: Invoice file write succeeded. Reactive outbox check is not applicable to this finance record write; no second write to same file needed. Continue processing remaining listed file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write updated purchase file with schema frontmatter
next_step.observation: Successfully wrote frontmatter-migrated content to the listed invoice file.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request by running OCR/frontmatter migration on both explicitly listed finance records, then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read relevant 99_system workflows and schema before edits, followed inbox explicit file list exactly, preserved full original file bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly required OCR workflow for exactly two files. Both listed files were read and updated with finance-schema YAML frontmatter (invoice schema for the invoice file; bill schema for the purchase file) while preserving original body text verbatim. After completing all requested items, the inbox file was deleted per 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
